demo.title: opensea.sh
demo.code:
# Read-only: top trending collections on Base
bankr prompt "Use opensea-api to get trending collections on Base"

# Buy an NFT — fulfills a listing on Seaport via Bankr wallet
bankr prompt "Use opensea-marketplace to buy NFT 0xCollection #1234 on Base"

# ERC20 → ERC20 cross-chain swap
bankr prompt "Use opensea-swaps to swap 100 USDC on Base for ETH on Arbitrum"

# Configure wallet signing for write operations
./opensea/opensea-wallet/scripts/configure.sh --provider bankr

# Register a paid AI-callable tool gated by x402 USDC
./opensea/opensea-tool-sdk/scripts/register-tool.sh --price 0.05

setup: Get a free instant API key: https://docs.opensea.io/reference/api-keys#instant-api-key-for-agents
Set `OPENSEA_API_KEY` in your environment (required for all read/write operations)
For write ops (marketplace, swaps), configure a wallet provider per `opensea-wallet/SKILL.md` — Bankr, Privy, Turnkey, Fireblocks, or local `PRIVATE_KEY`
Install: `npx skills add opensea` — read each sub-skill's `SKILL.md` before executing
